name: MSI PRO B840M-B Micro-ATX Motheroard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 5Gbps Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - VGA - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN (PROB840MB)
shortName: MSI PRO B840M-B Micro-ATX Motheroard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: MSI micro-ATX budget motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support and basic connectivity.
